divisions.title: Church Divisions
divisions.summary: Divisions over leaders, true wisdom is Christ crucified, immaturity and jealousy in the church

divisions.title: Moral Issues
divisions.summary: Dealing with immorality in the church, lawsuits among believers, teachings on marriage and celibacy

divisions.title: Christian Liberty
divisions.summary: Food sacrificed to idols, Paul's rights as an apostle, warnings from Israel's history, Lord's Supper

divisions.title: Spiritual Gifts
divisions.summary: Variety of gifts, one body, love is supreme, prophecy and tongues in worship

divisions.title: Resurrection and Closing
divisions.summary: The resurrection of Christ and believers, collection for Jerusalem, final instructions

chapterSummaries.1: Paul addresses divisions in the church, Christ the wisdom and power of God
chapterSummaries.2: Paul's message is Christ crucified, wisdom from the Spirit
chapterSummaries.3: Divisions show immaturity, we are God's fellow workers and temple
chapterSummaries.4: Apostles are servants of Christ, Paul's fatherly appeal
chapterSummaries.5: Expel the immoral brother, judgment of those inside the church
chapterSummaries.6: Lawsuits among believers, the body is a temple of the Holy Spirit
chapterSummaries.7: Concerning marriage, remain in your calling, teachings on celibacy
chapterSummaries.8: Food sacrificed to idols, knowledge puffs up but love builds up
chapterSummaries.9: Paul's rights as an apostle, becoming all things to save some
chapterSummaries.10: Warnings from Israel's history, flee from idolatry, do all for God's glory
chapterSummaries.11: Head coverings in worship, correction concerning the Lord's Supper
chapterSummaries.12: One Spirit gives many gifts, many members but one body
chapterSummaries.13: Love is supreme, greater than gifts, love never fails
chapterSummaries.14: Prophecy and tongues, orderly worship in the church
chapterSummaries.15: The gospel, resurrection of Christ and believers, victory over death
chapterSummaries.16: Collection for Jerusalem, Paul's travel plans, final greetings
